tasks.description: Delete deprecated modules: context-engine.js, teacher-prompt.js, step-parser.js and update manifest.json
tasks.expected_output: Dead files are removed from the filesystem and manifest loads cleanly without 404 module errors.

tasks.description: Sanitize cursor-guide.js & context-extractor.js removing findCandidates/buildPrompt references.
tasks.expected_output: Build tools execute cleanly and content_scripts initialize with zero undefined reference exceptions.
The watcher silently fires a payload object containing AI intent whenever the chat DOM paints new data.

tasks.description: Register CONTEXT_UPDATED background listener in service-worker.js to cache intents in chrome.storage.session.
tasks.expected_output: Intents reliably survive cross-origin domain navigations inside the session cache.

tasks.description: Build brain/step-normalizer.js to isolate actionable directives from conversational strings.
tasks.expected_output: Input text dynamically collapses into a structured JSON array regardless of bulleted vs numbered format.

tasks.description: Integrate validatePageMatch in intent-profiler.js aligning Teacher hints with live page heuristics.
tasks.expected_output: Returns a domain alignment score blocking execution if the user opened an unrelated page.

tasks.description: Expose flat list getter getElementsForMapping() inside context-extractor.js.
tasks.expected_output: DOM extracts drop heavy prototype inheritance natively mapping to stringified JSON nodes safely.

tasks.description: Construct brain/groq-mapper.js driving concurrent batch mapping execution over ALL step hints.
tasks.expected_output: Given N instructions and N DOM layout objects, groq mapper sends a singular HTTP POST minimizing latency.

tasks.description: Standup brain/guidance-state.js and StepQueue data structure.
tasks.expected_output: In-memory queue pushes resolving state asynchronously without blocking loop readers.

tasks.description: Rewrite TransitionEngine in cursor-guide.js using Step Lookahead interpolators.
tasks.expected_output: Cursor computes Step[N+1] trajectory while residing on Step[N] eliminating frame stutter.

tasks.description: Build PassiveProgressTracker attaching capture-phase Native Events (click, change, focus).
tasks.expected_output: Global listeners track naturally occurring user clicks and advance StepQueue state cleanly.

tasks.description: Construct DOMStabilityMonitor in content.js computing significance metrics.
tasks.expected_output: Returns numeric scores representing disruption; skips visual noise (<30) but catches nodal deletion (50+).

tasks.description: Develop brain/recovery-engine.js applying 3-level fallbacks on Confidence < 0.4.
tasks.expected_output: Nodes missing targets trigger targeted fuzzy searches natively without collapsing the whole layout map pipeline.

tasks.description: Synchronize tasks.json and state.json with new task arrays defined in docs/plan/implementation_plan.v2.resolved.md. This is required to bootstrap further execution.
tasks.expected_output: tasks.json reflects TSK-19 to TSK-21 (Phase 5: Speech & Edge Cases).
